Petroleum products
Interactive data tools
Weekly updates
Gasoline and Diesel Fuel Update
Weekly prices for U.S. regular gasoline and U.S. on-highway diesel fuel
Weekly Petroleum Status Report
Data on supply and disposition of crude oil and major petroleum products, including motor gasoline, distillate fuel oil, jet fuel, residual fuel, and propane
Heating Oil and Propane Update
Weekly heating oil and propane prices during the heating season (October through March).
Supply
Petroleum Supply Monthly
Data on the supply and disposition of crude oil and petroleum products, including production, imports and exports, movements, and inventories
Petroleum Supply Annual, Volume 1
(annual data) and
Volume 2
(monthly data)
Final data on the supply and disposition of crude oil and petroleum products
Refining and processing
Petroleum Marketing Monthly
Monthly and annual price and volume statistics covering crude oil and refined petroleum product sales in the United States
Refinery Capacity Report
Data series that include fuel, electricity, and steam purchased for consumption at refineries; refinery receipts of crude oil by method of transportation; and current and projected capacities for atmospheric crude oil distillation, downstream charge, production, and storage
U.S. Biodiesel Plant Production Capacity
Annual fuel ethanol production capacity report with data for all operating U.S. biodiesel plants as of January 1, 2025
U.S. Fuel Ethanol Plant Production Capacity
Annual fuel ethanol production capacity report with data for all operating U.S. fuel ethanol production plants as of January 1, 2025
U.S. Renewable Diesel and Other Biofuels Plant Production Capacity
Annual fuel ethanol production capacity report with data for all operating U.S. renewable diesel fuel and other biofuels plants as of January 1, 2025
Feedstocks Consumed at Biofuels Plants
Annual fuels and feedstock consumed for plant operations
Production
U.S. Oil and Natural Gas Wells by Production Rate
State-level data on well distribution by size and technology and analysis of emerging trends
Imports and movements
Company Level Imports
Imports data at the company level
U.S. Crude Import Tracking Tool
Maps and data for petroleum imports by type, crude oil grade, location, and country of origin
U.S. Liquids Pipeline Projects
Data on liquids (crude oil, petroleum products, and hydrocarbon gas liquids) pipeline projects that are completed (since 2010), under construction, or announced
More data ›
